MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment;
Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar this date, having been assigned by Department 206 for Uncontested Trial.
Judge David L. Ballati, Clerk Nancy Regas, Court Reporter Susan Lee, CSR #4280, Dept. 604.
Michael Sipes, attorney for Plaintiff, Bridgeport Financial, Inc., is present.
Defendant, Hugh Afshar, is not present.
Jeffrey Panzer, agent for Plaintiff, is affirmed and examined.
The following exhibits are marked for identification and admitted into evidence:
Plaintiff's Exhibit #1 - Rental Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit #2 - Guarantee of Tenancy Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit #3 - Photos of Move Out Inspection
Plaintiff's Exhibit #4 - Letter to Katayoun Pooya dated 9-4-02
Plaintiff's Exhibit #5 - Written Assignment
The matter is argued and submitted.
The Court orders Judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant Hugh Afshar in the amount of $2533.05, interest in the amount of $1,055.55 from August 26, 2002 thru October 30, 2006, costs in the amount of $206.30 and attorneys fees in the amount of $633.26, for a total of $4,428.16.
Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare judgment and submit it to the Court for approval.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Set For Trial On Oct-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
